use_cases: Trigger form submissions with styled action buttons
Navigate between pages with link-styled buttons
Create primary and secondary action buttons for UI components
Handle destructive actions with variant styling
Build accessible button groups with keyboard navigation support
ai_summary: A reusable Button component with multiple variants (default, destructive, outline, secondary, ghost, link) and sizes (default, sm, lg, icon) using Radix UI Slot for composition. Built with class-variance-authority for type-safe variant handling and Tailwind CSS for styling. Supports disabled states, focus rings, and asChild prop for polymorphism.
